'''Chandrila''' was the [[Star/Legends|primary star]] of the [[Chandrila system/Legends|Chandrila system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by seven [[Planet/Legends|planets]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Star-stub}}
